metadata.name: Correct an Error on an Application

description: An agent made a typo in an applicant's date of birth on a life insurance application that is pending review.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the application in the system.

nodes.task_description: Identify the incorrect date of birth.
Submit a request to the underwriter to correct the demographic information.

expected_outcome.value: The agent sends a formal request to the underwriting team to amend the application with the correct date of birth.
